channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: AI is dominating the market and Wall Street strategists debate bubble parallels: 1997 or 1999?
item.description: Are markets celebrating like it is 1999, or a few years earlier?

item.title: Ryanair's CFO says the airline has plans for an 'armageddon situation' as jet fuel crisis threatens weaker European airlines this winter
item.description: "Do we have plans for some kind of Armageddon situation? Of course, we do, but I don't see that coming to pass," said CFO Neil Sorahan.

item.title: While Trump insisted the Iran war would end 'soon,' an account in his name was buying millions in oil, defense and gold
item.description: A brokerage account bearing the president's name made 3,642 trades in the first quarter of 2026, hedging against a war he publicly said was nearly won.

item.title: Jury rules against Elon Musk in $150 billion lawsuit against OpenAI and Sam Altman
item.description: Elon Musk suffered a setback as a jury ruled in favor of OpenAI and Sam Altman.
